sections.title: Headers That Convert
sections.subtitle: First impressions happen in milliseconds. Craft a header that communicates value instantly and drives action.

items.title: Clear Value Proposition
items.body: Headlines that answer "what, who, why" in under 5 seconds.

items.title: Visual Hierarchy
items.body: Typography and spacing that guide the eye to the CTA naturally.

items.title: Responsive by Default
items.body: Fluid layouts that look sharp on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

items.title: Accessibility First
items.body: Semantic HTML, contrast ratios, and focus states built in.

sections.heading: Header Anatomy
sections.body: A high-performing header combines four core elements: a compelling headline that states the primary benefit, a supporting subhead that adds context or credibility, a primary call-to-action with clear action language, and a visual element (illustration, photo, or product shot) that reinforces the message. Keep navigation minimal — logo and one key link — to reduce decision fatigue.

sections.title: Ready to Refresh Your Header?
sections.body: Our design system includes 12 production-ready header variants. Pick one, customize, and ship today.

items.quote: Swapping our old header for the new variant lifted demo requests by 23% in the first week.
items.author: Mara Chen

items.quote: The accessibility audit passed on first try. Dark mode, focus states, reduced motion — all handled.
items.author: Jonas Weber

seo.metaTitle: Header Design Showcase — Modern Hero Sections
seo.metaDescription: Explore striking header designs with bold typography, immersive imagery, and clear calls to action. Built for conversion.
